aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The stars are quiet, but you never are. Coin flip.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos have gone silent. Your Slack notifications have not. The cosmos are winning.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — If the cosmos can rest, so can your pipeline.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You are also quiet. Your PR has been 'in review' for 11 days. Both are at peace with this.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — One of you says yes. The other says absolutely not. Schedule a meeting between yourselves.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos have nothing to say today. This is unprecedented. You will fill the silence with 47 Slack messages.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Something feels off. Trust it. Something is always off.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Your gut says something is wrong. Your gut is right. Check the logs.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — If the universe won't make noise today, you absolutely will.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos have gone quiet. You will interpret this as your moment to shine. Your code review will not agree.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — The cosmos found a bug. So did you. Still investigating. Do not ship.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet, which means something is definitely wrong. You have opened 14 tabs. You are still not sure which one has the answer.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You'll spend 45 minutes deciding. Then deploy anyway. You always do.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You have weighed all options carefully. You have decided to weigh them again tomorrow.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: Yes — You work best when no one's watching. No one is watching. Ship it.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos say nothing. You also say nothing. Your code ships silently at 11 PM. The incident report will not be silent.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — You were going to do it regardless of what the stars said anyway.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You have already pushed to production. You will explain it later. This is your entire brand.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — The plan was made Monday. You are executing the plan. The cosmos are not in the plan.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You are not. Your Jira board has 17 tickets and you've closed 4 already. It's 9 AM.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — You've already rewritten it in Rust. Deploy is now a philosophical question.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are taking the day off. You have decided legacy systems are the real problem. You are not wrong. You are also not fixing it today.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You started to deploy. Then you got distracted by the loading animation. It was pretty.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet and so are you. Your screen has been idle for 40 minutes. The ticket remains unresolved. You are at peace with this.
